sourceText: Through unwavering focus on inner spiritual experience, divine inspiration, and prolific writing to clarify my insights for posterity.
translatedText: Kupitia umakini usioyumba katika uzoefu wa ndani wa kiroho, maongozi ya Mungu, na uandishi mwingi ili kufafanua maarifa yangu kwa vizazi vijavyo.

sourceText: 12th-13th Century
translatedText: Karne ya 12-13

sourceText: Losing my father as a child and living as a fugitive, and the crushing defeat at the Battle of Chaldiran.
translatedText: Kumpoteza baba yangu kama mtoto na kuishi kama mkimbizi, na kushindwa vibaya katika Vita vya Chaldiran.

sourceText: Rallying the loyal Qizilbash tribes to build an empire and uniting my people through faith and poetry.
translatedText: Kukusanya makabila ya waaminifu wa Qizilbash ili kujenga himaya na kuwaunganisha watu wangu kupitia imani na mashairi.

sourceText: Late 15th - Early 16th Century
translatedText: Mwisho wa 15 - Mapema karne ya 16

sourceText: Jamal al-Din al-Afghani
translatedText: Jamal al-Din al-Afghani

sourceText: Witnessing the division and decline of the Islamic world under the pressure of European imperialism.
translatedText: Kushuhudia mgawanyiko na kupungua kwa ulimwengu wa Kiislamu chini ya shinikizo la ubeberu wa Ulaya.

sourceText: By advocating for Pan-Islamic unity and promoting internal reform through a rationalist interpretation of Islam.
translatedText: Kwa kutetea umoja wa Pan-Islamic na kuendeleza mageuzi ya ndani kupitia tafsiri ya kimantiki ya Uislamu.

sourceText: Late 19th Century
translatedText: Mwisho wa Karne ya 19

sourceText: Jabir ibn Hayyan
translatedText: Jabir ibn Hayyan

sourceText: Political persecution and secrecy
translatedText: Mateso ya kisiasa na usiri

sourceText: Establishing scientific methodology
translatedText: Kuanzisha mbinu za kisayansi

sourceText: Islamic Golden Age (8th-9th Century)
translatedText: Umri wa Dhahabu wa Kiislamu (karne ya 8-9)

sourceText: Ziya Gökalp
translatedText: Ziya Gokalp

sourceText: I endured profound mental anguish during the decline of the Ottoman Empire and was imprisoned and exiled for my political beliefs and activities with the Young Turks.
translatedText: Nilivumilia maumivu makali ya kiakili wakati wa kuporomoka kwa Milki ya Ottoman na nilifungwa na kuhamishwa kwa imani na shughuli zangu za kisiasa na Vijana wa Kituruki.

sourceText: I channeled my struggles into a coherent ideology—'Turkification, Islamization, Modernization'—which I spread through my writings, ultimately shaping the intellectual foundations of the new Turkish Republic.
translatedText: Nilielekeza mapambano yangu katika itikadi thabiti—'Turkification, Islamization, Modernization'—ambayo nilieneza kupitia maandishi yangu, hatimaye kuchagiza misingi ya kiakili ya Jamhuri mpya ya Uturuki.

sourceText: Early 20th Century
translatedText: Mwanzo wa Karne ya 20

sourceText: Karim Khan Zand
translatedText: Karim Khan Zand

sourceText: Navigating the treacherous civil wars and chaos that followed the assassination of Nader Shah.
translatedText: Kupitia vita vya kisaliti vya wenyewe kwa wenyewe na machafuko yaliyofuata mauaji ya Nader Shah.

sourceText: By combining military prowess with a policy of clemency and justice, I unified much of Iran and established a stable, prosperous state.
translatedText: Kwa kuchanganya uwezo wa kijeshi na sera ya huruma na uadilifu, niliunganisha sehemu kubwa ya Iran na kuanzisha taifa thabiti na lenye ufanisi.

sourceText: 18th Century
translatedText: Karne ya 18

sourceText: Katip Çelebi
translatedText: Katip Çelebi

sourceText: Interruption of scholarly pursuits due to military campaigns and bureaucratic duties.
translatedText: Kukatizwa kwa shughuli za kielimu kwa sababu ya kampeni za kijeshi na majukumu ya urasimu.

sourceText: Using an inheritance to devote his life entirely to scholarship, producing monumental works.
translatedText: Akitumia urithi kujitolea maisha yake kabisa kwa usomi, akitoa kazi kuu.

sourceText: 17th Century Ottoman Empire
translatedText: Milki ya Ottoman ya Karne ya 17

sourceText: The humiliating defeat of my grand invasion of Greece, particularly at Salamis and Plataea.
translatedText: Kushindwa kwa kufedhehesha kwa uvamizi wangu mkuu wa Ugiriki, hasa huko Salamis na Plataea.

sourceText: Shifting focus from military expansion to internal administration and grand construction projects to solidify my rule and legacy.
translatedText: Kuhamisha mwelekeo kutoka kwa upanuzi wa kijeshi hadi kwa utawala wa ndani na miradi mikubwa ya ujenzi ili kuimarisha sheria na urithi wangu.

sourceText: Achaemenid Empire
translatedText: Ufalme wa Achaemenid

sourceText: Thabit ibn Qurra
translatedText: Thabit ibn Qurra

sourceText: Forced to leave his native Harran due to religious disputes, his Sabian beliefs often put him at odds with the mainstream Islamic community.
translatedText: Kwa kulazimishwa kuondoka katika eneo lake la asili la Harran kwa sababu ya mizozo ya kidini, imani yake ya Wasabia mara nyingi ilimweka katika msuguano na jumuiya kuu ya Kiislamu.

sourceText: He found patronage under the Banu Musa brothers in Baghdad, where his genius was recognized, allowing him to flourish as a leading scholar in the House of Wisdom.
translatedText: Alipata ufadhili chini ya ndugu wa Banu Musa huko Baghdad, ambapo kipaji chake kilitambuliwa, na kumruhusu kustawi kama mwanachuoni mkuu katika Nyumba ya Hekima.

sourceText: 9th Century Islamic Golden Age
translatedText: Enzi ya Dhahabu ya Kiislamu ya Karne ya 9

sourceText: Social oppression and religious persecution for her beliefs and for being a woman, leading to imprisonment and estrangement from her family.
translatedText: Ukandamizaji wa kijamii na mateso ya kidini kwa imani yake na kwa kuwa mwanamke, na kusababisha kufungwa na kutengwa na familia yake.

sourceText: She found strength in her profound faith and expressed her convictions through powerful poetry, ultimately facing martyrdom with unwavering courage for her ideals.
translatedText: Alipata nguvu katika imani yake kuu na alionyesha imani yake kupitia mashairi yenye nguvu, hatimaye kukabiliana na kifo cha kishahidi kwa ujasiri usioyumba kwa maadili yake.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Karne ya 19

sourceText: The struggle to maintain artistic integrity and find stable patronage amidst the political turmoil between the Ottoman and Safavid empires.
translatedText: Mapambano ya kudumisha uadilifu wa kisanii na kupata ulinzi thabiti katikati ya machafuko ya kisiasa kati ya himaya za Ottoman na Safavid.

sourceText: Transforming personal suffering and worldly instability into profound poetic expressions of universal human emotion and divine love, finding solace in his art.
translatedText: Kubadilisha mateso ya kibinafsi na ukosefu wa utulivu wa kidunia kuwa usemi wa kina wa ushairi wa hisia za kibinadamu za ulimwengu wote na upendo wa kimungu, akipata faraja katika sanaa yake.

sourceText: 16th Century Ottoman Empire
translatedText: Milki ya Ottoman ya Karne ya 16

sourceText: The profound disappointment and betrayal after Sultan Mahmud of Ghazni failed to honor his promise of payment for the 'Shahnameh'.
translatedText: Kukatishwa tamaa na usaliti mkubwa baada ya Sultan Mahmud wa Ghazni kushindwa kutimiza ahadi yake ya malipo ya 'Shahnameh'.

sourceText: He found solace and purpose in the enduring legacy of his work, knowing it would preserve Persian culture and language for generations.
translatedText: Alipata kitulizo na kusudi katika urithi wa kudumu wa kazi yake, akijua kwamba ingehifadhi utamaduni na lugha ya Kiajemi kwa vizazi.

sourceText: 10th-11th Century
translatedText: Karne ya 10-11

sourceText: Despite my service, I was ensnared by political intrigue and ultimately faced a tragic, unjust end.
translatedText: Licha ya utumishi wangu, nilinaswa na hila za kisiasa na hatimaye nikakabili mwisho mbaya na usio wa haki.

sourceText: I compiled my life's work, decades of seafaring knowledge and collected charts, into my 'Book of Navigation' and my world maps, ensuring my discoveries would outlive me.
translatedText: Nilikusanya kazi ya maisha yangu, miongo kadhaa ya maarifa ya ubaharia na kukusanya chati, kwenye 'Kitabu changu cha Urambazaji' na ramani zangu za ulimwengu, nikihakikisha uvumbuzi wangu ungenipita.

sourceText: 16th Century Ottoman Empire
translatedText: Milki ya Ottoman ya Karne ya 16

sourceText: Constant warfare with the Byzantine Empire, political intrigue and betrayals within my own court, and the eventual conflict between my sons over succession were great burdens during my rule.
translatedText: Vita vya mara kwa mara na Milki ya Byzantium, fitina za kisiasa na usaliti ndani ya mahakama yangu, na mzozo kati ya wanangu kuhusu urithi ulikuwa mzigo mkubwa wakati wa utawala wangu.

sourceText: I fostered an era of immense cultural and scientific prosperity by patronizing the arts and establishing the House of Wisdom. Through diplomacy, I forged alliances, notably with Charlemagne, to secure the empire's stability.
translatedText: Nilikuza enzi ya ustawi mkubwa wa kitamaduni na kisayansi kwa kutunza sanaa na kuanzisha Nyumba ya Hekima. Kupitia diplomasia, nilitengeneza mashirikiano, hasa na Charlemagne, ili kupata uthabiti wa milki hiyo.

sourceText: 8th-9th Century
translatedText: Karne ya 8-9

sourceText: Lived through immense political instability, including the brutal invasion of Timur (Tamerlane), and often criticized the religious hypocrisy of his time.
translatedText: Aliishi kupitia machafuko makubwa ya kisiasa, kutia ndani uvamizi wa kikatili wa Timur (Tamerlane), na mara nyingi alikosoa unafiki wa kidini wa wakati wake.

sourceText: He found refuge in Sufi mysticism and expressed his complex feelings about love, faith, and life's hardships through his masterful ghazals.
translatedText: Alipata kimbilio katika mafumbo ya Kisufi na alionyesha hisia zake changamano kuhusu upendo, imani, na magumu ya maisha kupitia ghazal zake mahiri.

sourceText: 14th Century
translatedText: Karne ya 14

sourceText: Halide Edib Adıvar
translatedText: Halide Edib Adıvar

sourceText: Patriarchal oppression, the horrors of war, and political exile.
translatedText: Ukandamizaji wa baba, vitisho vya vita, na uhamisho wa kisiasa.

sourceText: Resistance through education and literature, fighting in the War of Independence, and championing female education.
translatedText: Upinzani kupitia elimu na fasihi, mapigano katika Vita vya Uhuru, na kupigania elimu ya wanawake.

sourceText: Early 20th Century, Late Ottoman & Early Turkish Republic
translatedText: Mapema Karne ya 20, Marehemu Ottoman na Jamhuri ya Uturuki ya Mapema

sourceText: The constant struggle of unifying warring city-states and establishing a just, uniform order across a vast and diverse empire.
translatedText: Mapambano ya mara kwa mara ya kuunganisha majimbo ya jiji yanayopigana na kuanzisha utaratibu wa haki, sawa katika himaya kubwa na tofauti.

sourceText: Through strategic military campaigns, shrewd diplomacy, and the promulgation of my Code, I forged a unified empire and established a foundation of law and justice for posterity.
translatedText: Kupitia kampeni za kimkakati za kijeshi, diplomasia ya busara, na utangazaji wa Kanuni yangu, nilitengeneza himaya iliyounganishwa na kuanzisha msingi wa sheria na haki kwa vizazi.

sourceText: Ancient Mesopotamia (18th Century BCE)
translatedText: Mesopotamia ya Kale (karne ya 18 KK)

sourceText: Hurrem Sultan (Roxelana)
translatedText: Hurrem Sultan (Roxelana)

sourceText: Abducted from my homeland and sold into slavery, I faced the brutal politics and rivalries of the Imperial Harem.
translatedText: Nikiwa nimetekwa nyara kutoka katika nchi yangu na kuuzwa utumwani, nilikabili siasa za kikatili na mashindano ya Mfalme Harem.

sourceText: Through my intelligence, charm, and unwavering devotion, I won the Sultan's heart, broke centuries of tradition to become his legal wife, and secured a powerful position for myself and my children.
translatedText: Kupitia akili, haiba, na kujitolea kwangu kusikoyumba, niliushinda moyo wa Sultani, nikavunja mila ya karne nyingi kuwa mke wake halali, na kujipatia cheo chenye nguvu kwa ajili yangu na watoto wangu.

sourceText: 16th Century Ottoman Empire
translatedText: Milki ya Ottoman ya Karne ya 16

sourceText: T. E. Lawrence
translatedText: T. E. Lawrence

sourceText: The immense psychological toll of war, the burden of his fame, and a deep sense of disillusionment with British imperial policy in the Middle East.
translatedText: Mgogoro mkubwa wa kisaikolojia wa vita, mzigo wa umaarufu wake, na hisia kubwa ya kukatishwa tamaa na sera ya kifalme ya Uingereza katika Mashariki ya Kati.

sourceText: He sought anonymity by enlisting in the ranks of the Royal Air Force and the Tank Corps under assumed names, finding solace in mechanical work and writing his memoirs.
translatedText: Alitafuta kutokujulikana kwa kujiandikisha katika safu ya Jeshi la Anga la Kifalme na Jeshi la Mizinga chini ya majina ya kudhaniwa, kupata faraja katika kazi ya mitambo na kuandika kumbukumbu zake.

sourceText: Early 20th Century
translatedText: Mwanzo wa Karne ya 20
